name: ROSHAMBO
description: GPU-accelerated 3D molecular shape comparison using Gaussian overlays. Compare a query molecule against a dataset to find shape-similar compounds. Supports both shape-only and combined shape + pharmacophore (color) scoring. Outputs aligned structures and similarity scores ranked by chosen metric.
capabilities: GPU-accelerated 3D molecular shape comparison using Gaussian overlays
Compare a query molecule against a dataset to find shape-similar compounds
Supports both shape-only and combined shape + pharmacophore (color) scoring
Outputs aligned structures and similarity scores ranked by chosen metric

query_molecule.description: Query molecule file for shape comparison

dataset.description: Dataset of molecules to compare against

scoring_method.description: Scoring method: 'shape' for shape-only or 'combo' for shape + pharmacophore
